title: Jacob's 3D Ladders
description: A Vanilla friendly ladder redesign that adds a realistic 3D look without breaking the classic Minecraft feel. (Features multiple style variants and mod compatibility.)
body:
![Explanation-Banner](https://i.imgur.com/1b5b4PR.png) Jacob's-3D-Ladders is a lightweight resource pack that gives ladders a fresh 3D look while keeping the original vanilla style. It doesn’t change the overall feel of the game, but adds a small detail that makes your builds more immersive. This pack is compatible with Minecraft versions from 1.9 up to the latest release, so you can enjoy it no matter which version you play. [**My Other Projects**](https://modrinth.com/user/JacobStar_) --- --- ![Version-Banner](https://i.imgur.com/rSKKuw4.png) | Normal Version | Description | |----------------|-------------| | ![1](https://i.imgur.com/UZNKIO7.png) | The primary version of the texture pack that I personally recommend, combining both variants and nail features for the best overall experience. |
Version List (Click to Expand)
| Version | Description | Versions | Download | |---------|-------------|----------|----------| | 2.0 | With this version, 3D stairs have now been added to Nemo's Carpentry mod.|1.14 - 1.21.5|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/6mVD93G8)| | 1.1 | A minor error in a variant has been corrected.|1.21.6 - 26.1.2|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/1.1)| | 1.0 | Model structure updated for enhanced 3D ladders. Ladders now appear more detailed and immersive than ever. Compatible with the latest Minecraft features and rendering improvements.|1.21.6 - 26.1.2|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/84F0HmC3)| | 1.0 | |1.14 - 1.21.5|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/rDRh9DqW)| | 1.0 | Multiple textures per ladder block are now supported. Introduces new ladder variations for more visual interest. Maintains vanilla-style while adding subtle depth.|1.13 - 1.13.2|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/N0eo3mY5)|
| No Variant | Description | |----------------|-------------| | ![1](https://i.imgur.com/x8DGY5q.png) | A streamlined version of the texture pack that excludes visual variants, focusing exclusively on the core nail feature for a consistent experience. |
Version List (Click to Expand)
| Version | Description | Versions | Download | |---------|-------------|----------|----------| | 2.0 | With this version, 3D stairs have now been added to Nemo's Carpentry mod.|1.14 - 1.21.5|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/iGQKWO6U)| | 1.0 | No Variant offers a single Variant, as in versions 1.9 and 1.12.2. This version is designed for people who dislike Variant.|1.14 - 26.1.2|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/Oc2Z7HpK)| | 1.0 | No Variant offers a single Variant, as in versions 1.9 and 1.12.2 This version is designed for people who dislike Variant. |1.13 - 1.13.2|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/SqN4U3ij)| | 1.0 | Only one texture per ladder block is supported. Ladders appear simpler, but still gain a subtle 3D effect. Perfect for players on older versions who want a vanilla-style enhancement.|1.9–1.12.2|[Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jacobs-3d-ladders/version/1.0)|
| No nail | Description | |----------------|-------------| | ![1](https://i.imgur.com/onHhf6F.png) | A variant-oriented version of the texture pack that preserves all visual diversity while completely excluding the core nail features. |

--- ![Compatibility](https://i.imgur.com/tORJuey.png) **Minecraft 1.9 – 1.12** Limited to one texture per block, so 3D ladders appear simpler.
Images ![1](https://i.imgur.com/l52yzFj.png) ![2](https://i.imgur.com/PZX4gV9.png)
**Minecraft 1.13** Supports multiple textures per block, introducing new ladder variations.
Images ![1](https://i.imgur.com/GEoagy9.png)
**Minecraft 1.14 – 1.21.5** Texture system updated, resulting in more detailed and varied ladder appearances.
Images ![1](https://i.imgur.com/qA8kqZu.png) ![1](https://i.imgur.com/q10U5uX.png) ![1](https://i.imgur.com/u8kPe6s.png) ![1](https://i.imgur.com/eJAHeIG.png) ![1](https://i.imgur.com/tyVjd3H.png) ![1](https://i.imgur.com/F84kl7l.png) ![1](https://i.imgur.com/Sq1UiuL.png) ![1](https://i.imgur.com/up9YXvo.png)
**Minecraft 1.21.6 and above** Model structure updated for the most detailed and enhanced 3D ladders.
Images ![1](https://i.imgur.com/DIiA1O3.png)
--- ![Credits & Thanks-Banner](https://i.imgur.com/7U9MoxE.png) - **Vanilla 3D Ladders** – fully created by me. - **Nemo's Carpentry Support** – thanks to **DevNemo** for kindly allowing me to add textures for his mod. - And of course, thanks to the Minecraft community for the feedback and support!
